events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: residential job, automotive brakes, observed field condition: rotor below minimum thickness (mic reading in photo - ME). Work rough-complete. Need estimate/interpret measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. Since no actual photo or numeric reading provided, but scenario says rotor below minimum thickness (mic reading in photo - ME). We need decide fail, risk high/critical, component conditions installed-defective, worn, failed maybe non-compliant. Need value numeric reading? Not provided. We can set value to 0? But task says use value for numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks for one. It asks estimate or interpret measurable condition. Since no actual measurement, maybe value 0 and confidence low? But observed condition says below minimum thickness. We can set value to e.g. 0 (unknown). But maybe better value: 0.0 placeholder. Need references: OEM specs, FMVSS-adjacent shop practice. Findings: rotor thickness below manufacturer minimum discard specification; braking performance and heat dissipation compromised; safety hazard. Actions: replace rotor, inspect caliper/pads, measure with micrometer, verify runout, retorque, road test. Rationale: rotor below minimum thickness reduces thermal mass and structural integrity, can lead to cracking, fade, longer stopping distances; violates OEM service limits and FMVSS-adjacent safe brake repair practice. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk critical maybe high. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80? Since roughed in assembled not closed. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, failed. Confidence maybe 0.9. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.
